# GitHub Issues Backlog (20)

1. Add language-specific parser heuristics for Python and TypeScript scoring signals.
2. Support configurable ignore/include globs via `contextbudget.toml`.
3. Implement dependency graph extraction and relevance propagation.
4. Add optional AST-based symbol snippet extraction.
5. Improve token estimation using pluggable tokenizer backends.
6. Add run diff command to compare two `run.json` artifacts.
7. Create HTML report renderer for CI artifact viewing.
8. Add strict budget policy mode with non-zero exit on overrun risk.
9. Support partial repository scans via changed-files input.
10. Add context chunk deduplication by semantic similarity.
11. Add cache TTL and invalidation policy controls.
12. Add compressed package export format (`.cbpack`).
13. Provide shell completion scripts for `bash` and `zsh`.
14. Improve quality risk estimate with weighted critical-file detection.
15. Add benchmark suite for scan/pack runtime and token savings.
16. Add optional multiprocessing for large repository scans.
17. Support monorepo partition strategies and workspace roots.
18. Add JSON Schema for `run.json` contract validation.
19. Build GitHub Action to enforce max token budget in PRs.
20. Publish public example gallery with real-world repositories.
